task_params.subject: Restarting Our Financial-Literacy Sessions / Reinicio de nuestras sesiones de educación financiera
message_points: Open with a warm thank-you to the volunteer team
Say the neighborhood financial-literacy sessions are restarting this month
Mention the first session is on May 28 at 6:30 PM
Ask volunteers to reply if they can help that evening
Mention support is especially needed for setup and bilingual facilitation
Keep the tone encouraging and community-focused
Include both English and Spanish in the same message

arguments.subject: Restarting Our Financial-Literacy Sessions / Reinicio de nuestras sesiones de educación financiera

attributes.subject: Spring volunteer check-in
attributes.body: Hi Samantha, a few of us are ready to help again whenever the community sessions restart. Let me know what dates you have in mind.

attributes.subject: Thank you for helping at the budgeting workshop
attributes.body: Team, thank you again for showing up for our last neighborhood budgeting workshop. Your support made the visuals and bilingual explanations much easier for everyone.

attributes.subject: Community center room availability
attributes.body: The Centro Comunitario de Rincon is open most Wednesday evenings this month if you want to restart the financial-literacy sessions soon.
